chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI CP No.D-2760 of 2024 ____________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) For hearing of main case 01.10.2025 None present for the petitioner Ms. Saima Imdad, AAG --------- This matter was taken up on 26.11.2024, when Counsel for the Petitioner was given time to file a Statement as to whether this matter falls within the domain of Constitutional Bench or not. No such Statement has been filed by the learned Counsel for the Petitioner. Today, none present for the petitioner without intimation. It appears that the petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this petition, which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution alongwith pending application(s), if any. Head of Const. Benches Judge Qurban*
